violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Glass top cover for service line was found with food debris. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee beverages were found stored on the ledge above the food prep counter. Employee beverages and other personal items should be stored away from food prep areas.
